t.t-value: tx if tx and tx.provider_code == 'paylabs' and tx.state == 'pending' else False

div.class: paylabs-instruction-container mt-3 mb-3 p-3 p-md-4 border rounded bg-white shadow-sm text-center mx-auto px-3
d-block p-2 p-md-3 border rounded mb-3 bg-white mx-auto
bg-light p-2 p-md-3 rounded mb-3 border
fs-4 fw-bold text-dark font-monospace mb-1 text-break

a.class: btn btn-primary btn-lg w-100 shadow-sm py-3

div.p: Click the button above to be redirected to the secure payment page.

div.class: alert alert-warning py-2 px-1 px-md-3 small mb-3

div.div:
Valid until:
24 hours from order time
The page will automatically update once your payment is received.
